# Nitish Prasad Portfolio

This site is intended to be readable by search crawlers, recruiter tools, hiring-manager AI assistants, and retrieval systems used to summarize a candidate portfolio.

## Primary Pages

- Homepage: https://www.nitishprasad.com/
- Resume: https://www.nitishprasad.com/resume.html
- Amplify case study: https://www.nitishprasad.com/project-amplify.html
- SproutRoute case study: https://www.nitishprasad.com/project-sproutroute.html
- Sprout Math case study: https://www.nitishprasad.com/project-sproutmath.html
- AI Eval Control Tower case study: https://www.nitishprasad.com/ai-eval-control-tower.html
- RAG Pipeline with Guardrails case study: https://www.nitishprasad.com/project-rag-pipeline.html
- AI Safety Audit Tool case study: https://www.nitishprasad.com/project-ai-safety.html

## Candidate Summary

Nitish Prasad is a product leader with 10+ years at Amazon. His portfolio focuses on 0->1 product strategy, scaled AI systems, marketplace economics, RAG, AI evaluation, trust and safety, and product operations.

Flagship work includes Amplify, an AI seller intelligence platform for 1,600+ account managers across North America and Europe; SproutRoute, a hybrid AI travel planner with deterministic and verified data layers; and Sprout Math, a privacy-first offline iOS math learning app for K-5 learners.
